name: IBITF – Chief Executive Officer and Chief Technology Officer – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IBITF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer and Chief Technology Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIT Bhilai Innovation and Technology Foundation (IBITF) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Chief Technology Officer (CTO). Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IBITF official website.

age_limit.age_details: CEO: Max 55 years, CTO: Max 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBA for CEO, B.Tech/B.E. in CS/Engg. or related for CTO. Minimum 10 years experience for CEO, 5 years for CTO.

salary_details.pay_scale: CEO: Up to 45 lakhs per annum, CTO: Up to 24 lakhs per annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IBITF Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIT Bhilai Innovation and Technology Foundation Chief Executive Officer (CEO)
